titleStmt.title: SII 38.207: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 207. (A.R. No. 207 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājanārāyaṇa Sambhuvarāya Year: 12 puraṭṭādi: 1, 1350 A.D.

summary.p: This records that Mudaliyār Vāgīśura Dēvar of Kīḻaimaḍam made an endowment of land, when he was dying. It is mentioned that he summoned the temple officials (tānattār) and devotees (māhēśvaras) of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and made an endowment of land called Kaḍuvaṉkōṭṭam at Puḻal, which he purchased from niyamaṅkiḻārkaḷ of Puḻal, to the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr as tirunāmattūkkāṇi, in order to meet the expenses for conducting worship, renovation (tiruppaṇi) and for performing special rituals in his name in the month of Māsi at the above temple. It is also recorded that this transaction was also engraved on the walls of the Tirumūlattānamuḍaiya nāyaṉār temple at Pūḻal. Further he also got an order issued by Tikkama Nāyakkar, exempting this land from taxes. It is also stated that two vēli, out of the above block of land along with a maṭha were granted to Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalam mudaliyār, his foster son whom he brought up as his successor and the rest of the land to the temple. Dēvargaḷ Nāyaṉ, a devotee (māhēśvara) figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakalalokacakkaravatti Irācanārāyaṇaṉcampuvarāyarkku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu puraṭṭāti mutaltiyati kiḻaimaṭattu mutaliyār tiruvoṟṟiyūril kālañceyta
ruḷukiṟa Aḷavil tāṉattilveṇṭuvaraiyum māheṟcuraril veṇṭuvaraiyum Aḻaittu tiruvuḷḷamāṉapaṭi nāṉ puḻalil niyamaṅkiḻārkaḷ pakkal koṇṭu puḻalil
tirumulattāṉamuṭaiyanāyaṉār tirukkaṭṭaḷaiil veṭṭiṉa kalveṭṭiṉpaṭi kaṭuvaṉkoṭṭamāṉa maṭappuṟam kāṇiyum tikkama nāyakkar pakkal Intakaṭuvaṉkoṭṭattukku
Iṟaiilikku vāṅkiṉa tirumukamum Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉārkku pūcaikkuntiruppaṇikkum tirumācimakattirunāḷiṉ maṟṟai nāḷ Eṉ perāle Oru tiruppavaṉi
kkum Ākakuṭutteṉ Iṉṉilattile nāṉ piḷḷai Āka vaḷartta Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalauṭaiyāṟkku Iraṇṭu veli nilamum Ivvūril paṇṭārattil koṇṭu maṭamum kuṭu
tteṉ Ivvācakamecātaṉamāka Inta Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu veliyum nikki nṉiṟaRead niṉṟanilam Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyuruṭaiyanāyaṉārkkut tirunā
mattuk kāṇi Āka cilālekai paṇṇikkoḷḷavum Ippaṭikku kiḻai maṭattu mutaliyārvākicuratevar tiruvuḷḷamāṉapaṭikku Ivai mākecuraril tevarkaḷnāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
